prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年北京理工大学在北京市综合类最低录取位次分别为约2309名→2126名→2754名→2776名→2767名，整体呈波动后移趋势。2023年起位次稳定在2750名附近 ，2025年基准约2767名；该校在北京市综合类招生计划2021年184人→2022年179人→2023年179人→2024年173人→2025年173人，呈逐年小幅缩减趋势。2026年计划160人，较2025年减少13人，缩招约7.5%，竞争压力有所上升。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京理工大学为985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名持续上升，2026 年位列第14名（与北京协和医学院并列），稳居全国顶尖高校行列；2026年高考周期内学校声誉评价为偏负面，涉及师德师风及学校管理相关舆情事件（宫琳事 件等），可能对部分考生报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度为较热（总排名第47位），短视频平台曝光度中等偏上；第五轮学科评估中，信息与通信工程、控制 科学与工程获评A+，光学工程、机械工程、材料科学与工程、管理科学与工程、计算机科学与技术获评A，力学、化学工程与技术、工商管理、数学、物理学获评A-，共12个A-及 以上学科，工科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等北理工优势相关专业大类持续高热推荐，社会报考热度高；北京市2026年普通高考总 人数约84900人，较2025年65434人增加约29.7%，考生规模大幅扩大，竞争显著加剧，2025年为430分；北京理工 大学位于北京市，为本省考生提供了地域便利性，本地招生占比虽逐年下降但仍保持较高绝对人数，对本市考生吸引力稳定。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2026年招生计划缩减7.5%、北 京市考生总数大幅增加约29.7%、学校软科排名高位稳定但声誉偏负面等因素，考虑考生规模激增带来的竞争加剧效应，预测2026年最低录取位 次约2662名，波动区间2343–2981名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（徐特立英才班）
- 工科试验班（未来精工技术）
- 工科试验班（拔尖计划）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（电子信息实验班）
- 工科试验班（信息科学技术）
- 工科试验班（智能制造与智能车辆菁英班）
- 工科试验班（航空航天与机电类）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 理科试验班（理学与材料菁英班）
- 经济管理试验班（含数字化管理方向）
- 社会科学试验班（人文社科/管理与经济）
- 工业设计。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2343–2981名内，建议以二档工科试验班为主力报考方向，一档徐特立英才班/未来精工技术可冲刺，三档理学与材料菁英班/经济管理试验班作为稳妥保底。位次 明显优于区间下限（2343名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Beijing Institute of Technology in the comprehensive category in Beijing were approximately 2309 → 2126 → 2754 → 2776 → 2767, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend. Since 2023, the ranking has stabilized around 2750, with a baseline of about 2767 in 2025. The enrollment plan for the comprehensive category in Beijing was 184 in 2021 → 179 in 2022 → 179 in 2023 → 173 in 2024 → 173 in 2025, showing a gradual slight reduction. In 2026, the plan is 160, a decrease of 13 from 2025, a reduction of about 7.5%, increasing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings has been rising, reaching 14th in 2026 (tied with Peking Union Medical College), firmly among the top universities in the country. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the school's reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents related to teacher ethics and school management (such as the Gong Lin incident), which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity is relatively high (47th overall), with moderate to high exposure on short video platforms. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering, and Control Science and Engineering were rated A+, Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, and Computer Science and Technology were rated A, and Mechanics, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Business Administration, Mathematics, and Physics were rated A-, totaling 12 disciplines rated A- or above, highlighting strong engineering capabilities.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other advantageous related majors at Beijing Institute of Technology continue to be highly recommended, with high social application enthusiasm. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Beijing general college entrance examination is about 84,900, an increase of about 29.7% from 65,434 in 2025, significantly expanding the candidate pool and intensifying competition. In 2025, the cutoff was 430 points. Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, providing geographical convenience for local candidates. Although the proportion of local enrollment has been declining year by year, the absolute number remains high, maintaining stable attractiveness to local candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as a 7.5% reduction in the 2026 enrollment plan, a significant increase of about 29.7% in the total number of candidates in Beijing, the school's stable high ranking in Soft Science but somewhat negative reputation, and the intensified competition due to the surge in candidate numbers, the predicted minimum admission ranking for 2026 is about 2662, with a fluctuation range of 2343–2981.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xu Teli Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Future Precision Engineering Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Top Talent Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Electronic Information Experimental Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Smart Manufacturing and Intelligent Vehicle Elite Class)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Aerospace and Mechanical and Electrical Engineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Science Experimental Class (Science and Materials Elite Class)
- Economics and Management Experimental Class (Including Digital Management Direction)
- Social Science Experimental Class (Humanities and Social Sciences/Management and Economics)
- Industrial Design.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 2343–2981, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 engineering experimental classes as the main application direction, with Tier 1 Xu Teli Elite Class/Future Precision Engineering Technology as a reach, and Tier 3 Science and Materials Elite Class/Economics and Management Experimental Class as a safe backup. For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 2343), prioritize applying for Tier 1 flagship majors.
